description: Transform the raw movie dataset at /home/ga/Documents/movies.csv into an ROI analysis workbook in WPS Spreadsheet, saved as /home/ga/Documents/Movie_ROI_Analysis.xlsx. On the main data sheet, add and calculate columns for 'Profit' (Gross minus Budget), 'ROI' (Profit divided by Budget with error handling for zero or blank budgets), and 'Runtime_Category' (classifying Runtime as 'Short' for <90, 'Feature' for 90-120, 'Epic' for >120, and 'Unknown' for 0 or blank). Format the header row as bold and freeze the top row. Create a 'Genre_Summary' sheet that calculates the Average ROI (formatted as percentage) and Average Gross (formatted as currency) for Action, Comedy, Drama, Horror, and Animation genres. Include a bar or column chart on the summary sheet visualizing the Average Gross for these five genres.
